data.name: BDSM Sex - Episode 7
data.detailed_description:
A visual novel series with animations about a young woman who delves deeper into the world of BDSM: under the guidance of her Master and Mistress, Katy explores new sensations, devices, and techniques that push her boundaries.

GAME DESCRIPTION

In Episode Seven, Katy arrives for a new session, dressed in a revealing black lingerie that leaves little to the imagination.
Her Master promptly demands that she demonstrate her loyalty by fulfilling his and the Mistress’s desires.
Obediently, Katy gets down on her knees and does as she’s told.
After making sure Katy is horny and desperate, the Master and Mistress together introduce various BDSM devices, exploring different levels of intensity.
We promise a story with arousing dialogue, realistic-looking characters, and high-definition graphics.

FEATURES

- HD renders and animations
- Video and image gallery

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10
  • 處理器: 2 GHz Dual Core
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Graphics card supporting DirectX 9.0c
  • DirectX: 版本：9.0c
  • 儲存空間: 1 GB 可用空間
  • 音效卡: Any
